title: Activity>Files>Possibility to show files from mirror column
excerpt:
Hello. Currently in Activity Log > Files we can review only files attached to specific item/sub-item directly. Not files from mirror files column. 
But I can see that you have possibility to link files from mirror column…

posts.author: Suzanna (Suzanna Lapchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello. Currently in Activity Log > Files we can review only files attached to specific item/sub-item directly. Not files from mirror files column.
But I can see that you have possibility to link files from mirror columns .
It will help us a lot and easy life at list of 4 different departments to have all of them in 1 place like activity>files (both attached files and files from mirror columns).

Thanks
